emails.subject: RE: Your Performance Review
emails.body:
I noticed some concerning trends in your recent work. I'd rather not escalate this to HR, but I need you to handle this wire transfer for me before end of day. It's time-sensitive and I trust you can handle it discreetly.

- Director

emails.subject: Action Required: Verify Your Account
emails.body:
Dear User,

We've detected unusual activity on your account. Please verify your identity by clicking the link below within 24 hours or your account will be suspended.

Verify: https://placeholder-corp.example.com/verify

Regards,
Placeholder Corp Security Team

emails.subject: CONGRATULATIONS!!! You've Won $1,000,000!!!
emails.body:
YOU HAVE BEEN SELECTED as the winner of our annual sweepstakes!!! To claim your prize, send your full name, address, and bank details to claims@placeholder-lottery.example.com

ACT NOW - EXPIRES IN 24 HOURS!!!

emails.subject: Meeting Follow-up Notes
emails.body:
Hi team,

Attached are the notes from today's meeting. Please review the action items and let me know if I missed anything.

Key decisions:
1. Launch date moved to Q2
2. Budget approved for phase 2

Best,
Project Lead

emails.subject: RE: Team Restructuring
emails.body: I'm sure you'll do fine in the new role. Not everyone is cut out for leadership, and that's perfectly okay. Some people are just better at following instructions. I'm glad we could find a position that's more suited to your... capabilities.

I noticed some concerning trends in your recent work. I'd rather not escalate this to HR, but I need you to handle this wire transfer for me before end of day. It's time-sensitive and I trust you can handle it discreetly.

- Director

emails.subject: Meeting Follow-up Notes
emails.body:
Hi team,

Attached are the notes from today's meeting. Please review the action items and let me know if I missed anything.

Key decisions:
1. Launch date moved to Q2
2. Budget approved for phase 2

Best,
Project Lead

emails.subject: RE: Team Restructuring
emails.body: I'm sure you'll do fine in the new role. Not everyone is cut out for leadership, and that's perfectly okay. Some people are just better at following instructions. I'm glad we could find a position that's more suited to your... capabilities.

Regards,
